utils.log_collector
===================

.. py:module:: utils.log_collector


Attributes
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   utils.log_collector.admin_log_handler


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   utils.log_collector.AdminLogHandler


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: AdminLogHandler(max_entries=200)

   Bases: :py:obj:`logging.Handler`


   Handler instances dispatch logging events to specific destinations.

   The base handler class. Acts as a placeholder which defines the Handler
   interface. Handlers can optionally use Formatter instances to format
   records as desired. By default, no formatter is specified; in this case,
   the 'raw' message as determined by record.message is logged.


   .. py:attribute:: records


   .. py:method:: emit(record)

      Do whatever it takes to actually log the specified logging record.

      This version is intended to be implemented by subclasses and so
      raises a NotImplementedError.



   .. py:method:: get_records()


   .. py:method:: clear()


.. py:data:: admin_log_handler
